name: Jefferson Davis Southern Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Broiler-fryer chicken - cleaned and cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken pieces in a pressure cooker and cook for 20 minutes.
2. Remove the chicken and lightly bread with cracker crumbs.
3. Melt the butter in a frying pan.
4. Cook the chicken until lightly brown (about 5 minutes).
5. Remove and serve at once.
